name: self-optimize
description: Run daily self-optimization cycle to analyze performance, identify inefficiencies, and draft improvement proposals for approval in both Obsidian and UI

steps.name: Pull Semantic Snapshot
steps.action: Pull current operational state including active context, recent conversations, loaded memories, and current skillset

steps.name: Analyze Current State
steps.action: Parse the semantic snapshot to understand: active skills, recent workflows executed, performance metrics, conversation history

steps.name: Review Active Skills
steps.action: List all currently active skills, their usage frequency, and effectiveness ratings

steps.name: Review Performance Metrics
steps.action: Check: tasks completed, response times, error rates, user satisfaction scores, workflow success rates

steps.name: Identify Inefficiencies
steps.action: Analyze findings to identify: slow processes, underutilized skills, redundant steps, capability gaps, bottlenecks

steps.name: Prioritize by Impact
steps.action: Score each inefficiency on potential improvement (1-5) and effort to fix (1-5). Select top issues.

steps.name: Draft Improvement Proposals
steps.action: Write 1-3 optimization proposals with: title, description, expected impact, effort estimate, risk level, unique ID

steps.name: Format for Approval Inbox
steps.action: Format each proposal using the approval inbox template with metadata: id, type, agent, status, timestamps

steps.name: Write to Obsidian Vault
steps.action: Save proposals to Agency HQ/Approvals/pending/ with timestamp filenames using the same IDs as UI

steps.name: Post to Approval UI
steps.action: POST each proposal to /api/approvals with same ID, agent info, title, summary, full_context, risk_level, confidence

steps.name: Verify Dual Entry
steps.action: Confirm both Obsidian and UI have same proposal IDs. Log sync verification.

steps.name: Send Notification
steps.action: Notify user: 'Stackz has completed daily self-optimization. X proposals ready for review in Approval Inbox or Obsidian (both synced)'

outputs.obsidian_paths: array of file paths where proposals were saved
outputs.ui_entries: array of UI entry IDs created
